name: MicMute
description: Secure boilerplate for Electron app based on Vite

scripts.compile: npm run build && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.mjs
scripts.compile:linux: node scripts/verify-linux-packaging-tools.mjs && npm run build && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.mjs --linux
scripts.compile:win: node scripts/verify-win-packaging-tools.mjs && npm run build && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.mjs --win
scripts.init: npm run create-renderer && npm run integrate-renderer && npm install
